jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 5+ years of product or program management, product marketing, business development or technology experience
- Bachelor's degree or equivalent
- Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition
- Experience with end to end product delivery
- Experience with feature delivery and tradeoffs of a product
- Experience as a product manager or owner
- Experience owning technology products
jobs.description:
Amazon Global Selling Experience team is seeking an experienced Product Manager to for an exciting new program focused on cross-border selling and international expansion. You will be responsible for driving the Seller Experience for Amazon Global Selling. Amazon Global Selling is the next frontier for the marketplace and allows sellers to sell across the Globe. You will be responsible for driving the product strategy, product vision, roadmap, implementation (with technology teams), product marketing and feature adoption.

You will need to develop a deep understanding of cross-border trade, regulations, logistics, payments and seller/customer needs.

Key job responsibilities
· Product strategy and direction: Continually assess the needs of sellers, market trends, competitive opportunities and threats in defining and evolving the Amazon Global Selling product strategy in your area of product ownership. Define both long term strategy and short term plans to achieve the product vision and deliver business results. You will also contribute to the overall business and marketing strategy in your area of focus.
· Roadmap Planning: Ensure consistent execution of product lifecycle processes from concept to launch. Provide value-based prioritization of product development initiatives to ensure maximum ROI and market-driven alignment. Deliver world-class innovation in features, usability and product performance in consistent cadence of releases. Manage a cross-functional process for prioritizing, delivering and launching major product releases.
· Requirements Definition: Develop comprehensive product plans, incorporating market requirements, define the competitive arena, and establish the objectives, strategies, and actions required to achieve business goals. Produce high quality requirements documents and effectively prioritize and manage the scope of each product launch to deliver key capabilities on time and on budget. Writes user stories to communicate customer needs in an Agile development environment. Work closely with Legal and Tax on regulations and compliance requirements to eliminate seller adoption bottlenecks.
· Product Roll-out: Create and execute go-to-market plans for new features. Monitor key performance metrics to ensure product performance and identify optimisation opportunities. Partner closely with the business teams to drive adoption and ensure processes for on boarding that are easy and intuitive.

A day in the life
The ideal candidate will be enthusiastic about managing challenging, complex and ambiguous projects across multiple teams and locations. We are looking for a tenured Product leader who shares Amazon's passion for the customer—someone who understands the importance of compelling features and functionalities in driving great experience. In addition, the candidate will also be able to influence without authority and earn trust of a wide range of cross-functional, tech/non-tech stakeholders.

jobs.description:
The Cart Building and Consolidation team owns products that help customers build and manage their shopping cart throughout their purchase journey across Amazon's Emerging Stores. The team is looking for a high impact Product Manager who can identify common themes across geographies and bring together a coherent plan across disparate customer needs

Key job responsibilities
- The Product Manager will be responsible for building and delivering on a roadmap of initiatives cutting across countries.
- The Product Manager will need to identify key themes, align on top priorities, work with Tech, individual country leaders and other global teams to deliver goals.

A day in the life
The Product Manager will
(i) work with country teams to understand customer requirements
(ii) identify key gaps in current cart building initiatives and means to fill those
(iii) align with country leadership on top priorities ,
(iv) develop a Cart Building short-term and long-term roadmap cutting across geographies
(v) work with Tech on delivering to the roadmap
(vi) own product performance metrics across these geographies

About the team
As part of the Delivery Experience vertical, we help customers across multiple geographies build and manage their shopping cart. We help customers (i) easily identify relevant items that they can purchase together (ii) select relevant delivery options that improve convenience of delivery (iii) help customers be more eco-friendly in their purchases. We own (i) the Tech products which help customers with the above and (ii) overall tracking and reporting of relevant metrics

jobs.description:
The Senior Technical Program Manager in Amazon Compliance Services will lead technology compliance initiatives across multiple organizations impacting each and every person buying, selling, or handling Amazon products will be your customer.

Amazonians work from the office five days per week, and you would work shoulder to shoulder with fast-growing Compliance Services technical teams.

In the compliance technology organization, we own ensuring that products at Amazon are compliant with all legal, trade, product safety, environmental and food safety requirements.

We focus on the safety of all our customers and employees, creating a world-class experience for our millions of vendors and sellers world-wide, and inventing the best business and regulatory models for safe and sustainable chains in our industries. Amazon is driven by being “the world’s most customer centric company."

We're looking for a unique technical expert to drive cross-organizational projects to build scalable, reusable products that help Amazon demonstrate compliance spanning numerous worldwide regulations.

Key job responsibilities
As a Senior Technical Program Manager, you have an entrepreneurial spirit and want to make a big impact on Amazon and its customers. You enjoy building massive scale and high performance systems but also have a bias for delivering simple and incremental solutions to complex problems.

You will work alongside product management, research, design, and engineering to define and build the essential lovable product. Along the way you’ll need to identify opportunity for improvements and put processes and tools in place to scale the program and support continual efficiency gains.

You will be required to track, communicate status on and independently drive issues to resolution. Cross-team coordination, project management and an ability to learn and understand new technology are essential. Each and every person buying, selling, or handling Amazon products will be your customer.

If you’d like to make a real-world difference by working hard, having fun, and making history, this is the team for you!

About the team
Compliance Shared Services (CoSS) develops services which provide a singular best-in-class set of experiences, fulfilling compliance requirements for sellers and vendors. Our team works on the premise of building pluggable and reusable experiences and services which are configuration driven and scale to millions of sellers, millions of SKUs and de-risk multi-Billion GMS.

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 8+ years of technical product management, program management or engineering experience
- Experience shaping business strategy for technical products or services for large enterprises or partners
- Experience managing and deploying ML products
- Experience influencing multiple stakeholders and leading cross functional teams across geographies and business units
- Bachelor's degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
- Demonstrated ability to operate independently with a high degree of ownership
jobs.description:
Amazon Photos helps consumers preserve and relive their memories. The service comes with unlimited photo storage for Prime members and is one of the largest used Prime benefits in 8 countries around the world. Amazon Photos' apps are available on iOS (4.8 rating), Android (4.7 rating), Web, Desktop, Fire Tablet & Fire TV. The service is also integrated into Alexa+ devices such as Echo Show and Fire TV and powers the ambient and AI-driven experiences on these devices. In 2025, the business released new natural language search, integrated with voice-based experiences on Alexa+ and is building a variety of AI-powered experiences that are in the process of being released to customers.

We are hiring a Principal Product Manager Technical to lead product strategy for Amazon Photos' AI and media intelligence capabilities. This is a high-impact, high-autonomy role: you will be the sole Product Manager embedded within our Bangalore engineering organization, driving vision and roadmap for our most strategic technology investments. You will operate with significant independence while partnering closely with US-based product leadership to ensure alignment with Amazon Photos' global strategy. As the only PM in Bangalore, you will also steward product culture—mentoring engineers on product thinking and fostering customer obsession. This role offers significant growth potential.

You will own product strategy for three critical areas: advancing face clustering to help customers organize photos of the people who matter most; launching pet detection and clustering to extend these features to the pets in customers' families; and pioneering semantic understanding for video to unlock new ways to search and rediscover memories. Beyond these, you will pursue high-priority opportunities as the AI/ML landscape evolves.

We're looking for an entrepreneurial leader who thrives in ambiguity, brings clarity to complex technical initiatives, and earns trust as a genuine partner to engineering and science teams. The right candidate has a passion for photos and video, understands the emotional weight of personal memories, and is motivated by helping customers preserve and rediscover the moments that matter most.


Key job responsibilities
• Define and drive product vision, strategy, and roadmap for AI-powered media intelligence including face clustering, pet detection and clustering, and video semantic understanding
• Serve as product leader for the Bangalore engineering organization, providing strategic direction, prioritization, and day-to-day decision-making
• Operate with high ownership while collaborating closely with US-based product leadership across time zones
• Partner with engineering and applied science teams to translate ML and computer vision capabilities into delightful customer experiences
• Define success metrics, analyze data, and iterate to improve accuracy, performance, and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with Amazon Photos, Alexa, Echo Show, and Fire TV teams to ensure AI capabilities integrate seamlessly across Amazon's ecosystem
• Identify and pursue opportunities that advance Amazon Photos' mission
• Represent the Bangalore organization's capabilities and roadmap to senior leadership

A day in the life
Your day starts with a US product leadership sync before collaborating with Bangalore engineering & applied science partners. You might analyze face clustering accuracy, debate whether we can distinguish a customer's golden retriever from their neighbor's, or write requirements for video semantic search. You end the day knowing your features will help a parent find every photo of their child's first year, or someone rediscover a video of a pet they miss. No two days look the same. The AI is pioneering, the problems are complex, and the impact is real. Every day you're helping millions keep cherished memories alive.

jobs.description:
Alexa is the Amazon cloud service that powers Echo: the world’s best AI-powered digital personal assistant. We're seeking an experienced Sr Technical Program Manager to lead key Monetization initiatives for Amazon Alexa. This is an exciting opportunity to transform and shape the business while building delightful experiences on Alexa!

We are a product and engineering team building products and underlying services to enable monetization experiences on Alexa. This team is special in 3 ways: (1) we have an impactful core mission with high visibility and revenue goals, (2) we are building innovative products both for end Alexa customers and advertisers (3) we encourage all members of the team to own and shape the roadmap and contribute to the success of the business. Come join a team that thrives on innovation, delighting customers, while driving business success!

Experience in the following domains is preferred: e-commerce, online advertising, search, AI powered personal assistants, and related areas.

Key job responsibilities
In this role you will be responsible for scoping and delivering large projects end-to-end. Responsibilities include collection of business requirements, translating requirements to specs, driving project schedules from design to release, and managing production launches. You will lead and coordinate design/implementation efforts between teams to develop optimal solutions. You will be expected to make appropriate tradeoffs to optimize time-to-market, clearly communicate goals, roles, responsibilities, and desired outcomes to internal cross-functional and remote project teams.

About the team
Alexa is the Amazon cloud service that powers Echo: the world’s best AI-powered digital personal assistant. We're seeking an experienced Sr Technical Program Manager to lead key Monetization initiatives for Amazon Alexa. This is an exciting opportunity to transform and shape the business while building delightful experiences on Alexa!
